arts.ttl: Arsenal could be dealt transfer blow by Unai Emery as 'sensational' swap talks planned
arts.sum: Arsenal reportedly suffer a blow in their pursuit of Paris Saint-Germain striker Randal Kolo Muani, whom Aston Villa could swap for Jhon Duran.

arts.ttl: Transfer news and rumours: Vitor Reis to Brighton, Ben Sheaf to Leeds, Cauley Woodrow to Wrexham
arts.sum: Sports Mole rounds up the latest transfer news and rumours, including Vitor Reis to Brighton & Hove Albion, Ben Sheaf to Leeds United and Cauley Woodrow to Wrexham.

arts.ttl: Arsenal fitness update as Odegaard dropped for Brighton game
arts.sum: Arsenal captain Martin Ødegaard was unexpectedly dropped to the bench for Saturday’s trip to Brighton & Hove Albion as a fitness update was issued. Mikel Arteta named a weakened lineup for the Premier League as his squad has been hit by injuries and illness. Kai Havertz has been left out of the matchday squad for […] The post Arsenal fitness update as Odegaard dropped for Brighton game first appeared on The Football Faithful.

arts.sum: Arsenal manager Mikel Arteta has raised eyebrows with his team selection for Saturday night's fixture away at Brighton with Martin Odegaard and Gabriel Martinelli both on the bench

arts.ttl: Micah Richards and Gary Lineker predict where Arsenal will finish in the Premier League this season
arts.sum: Arsenal have enjoyed a solid season so far as they remain firmly in the Premier League title picture and are also doing well in the...

arts.ttl: How to watch Brighton vs Arsenal - TV channel, live stream and kick-off time
arts.sum: Arsenal's quest to win the Premier League title continues this weekend as they travel to face Brighton & Hove Albion. With Sky Sports broadcasting the fixture, fans will also be able to live stream Brighton vs Arsenal should they wish to do so.

arts.ttl: Arsenal told to 'break the bank' for Alexander Isak after £150m transfer claim
arts.sum: Paul Merson has called on Arsenal to "break the bank" and sign Newcastle United forward Alexander Isak this month. Isak has three-and-a-half years remaining on his current deal with Newcastle United, but in October the club's manager, Eddie Howe, admitted the possibility of a new deal for the forward was a "complex situation".

arts.ttl: £67m Raphinha deal, £100m Isak issue, Dani Olmo offer - Arsenal January transfer priority revealed - Lee Wilmot - football.london
arts.sum: The January transfer window is now open and Arsenal are on the lookout for deals to strengthen their playing squad in pursuit of the Premier League title. With Saka's injury, the Gunners may well look for a versatile option - as they did in the summer when signing Raheem Sterling on loan somewhat ridiculously - as opposed to an out-and-out striker.
